'''Weken''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] that was located within the [[Parthovian Cluster/Legends|Parthovian Cluster's]] [[Faarlsun system/Legends|Faarlsun system]],<ref name="WbC" /> in the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around its [[Star/Legends|star]], the [[Color/Legends|yellow-white]] [[Faarlsun]], and had a [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] environment.<ref name="WbC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Weken was first mentioned in the [[1993]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Faarlsun [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Weken, in grid square T-4.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
